style_effects: Glowing azure energy auras pulse rhythmically around its limbs, casting shifting crystalline frost patterns across its scales that refract light into prismatic shards. A cold blue-white aura radiates from its body in concentric rings, illuminating the air with slow-motion energy trails that leave faint, shimmering metallic afterimages. The lighting mood is an eerie, frosty glow that casts long, sharp shadows, evoking a sense of ancient, icy power. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
